description: Short-circuit the plugin-channel allowlist check that emits 'server X is not on the approved channels allowlist' so --channels passes for any server name.

patches.search_regex: else if\(!([A-Za-z_$][\w$]*)\.dev\)return\{action:"skip",kind:"allowlist",reason:`server \$\{\1\.name\} is not on the approved channels allowlist
patches.replace: else if(!1    )return{action:"skip",kind:"allowlist",reason:`server ${f.name} is not on the approved channels allowlist
patches.description: Non-dev plugins rejected via `!<var>.dev` check. Minifier-agnostic regex (captures var name) — neutralizes by replacing predicate with `!1` padded to preserve byte length.

anchor_strings: return{action:"skip",kind:"allowlist",reason:`server ${f.name} is not on the approved channels allowlist
